title: MobileMortar-3
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''MobileMortar-3''' was an artillery platform which combined the [[MM-s3 grenade launcher]] and [[WW-676 repulsorlift sled]] to create a mobile fire-support weapon. MobileMortar-3s were used by both the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]], as well as the later [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and planetary defense forces.<ref name="Arms & Equipment Guide">''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]''</ref>

These platforms were typically issued as support weapons for army [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]], or operated as four-vehicle light mechanized infantry units.<ref name="The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology">''[[The Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]''</ref>
